caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones sits in a room filled with framed pictures on the walls and a white mannequin in the background. His t-shirt features the printed text "I CN NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK!". He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, pointing his index finger toward something off-screen to his right. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red and white logo on the right. The scene remains static in terms of composition, with only the man's facial expressions and the movement of his right arm and finger changing slightly as he continues to speak and gesture.
